prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约7376→8390→14383→4451→4252，2023年因专业组拆分出现异常高位次（14383），2024年大幅回升至4451，2025年进一步前移至4252 ，近两年呈明显前移趋势，2025年基准约4252名；该校在河北省物理类招生计划2021年301人→2022年245人→2023年237人→2024年175人→2025年159人，持续缩招；2026年计划101人，较2025年再缩招约36.5%，缩招幅度显著，竞争压力明显加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28 名（Top 30），近年排名稳定在28–32名区间，为国内顶尖工科强校之一；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要原因涉及录取断档信号（2023年电信学部断档至60000名、2024年 投档线异常信号）；抖音热度排名第55/106，评价为较热，短视频曝光量中等偏上；历史投档异常信号为低关注，整体声誉对报考心理有一定压制；化学工程与 技术A+（全国顶尖），力学A、机械工程A、土木工程A、工商管理A、管理科学与工程A、软件工程A，控制科学与工程A-、环境科学与工程A-；共10个A-及以上学科，工科实力突出 ，与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等大连理工优势相关专业大类2026年持续高热推荐；本省2026年普通高考总人数609800， 较2025年物理类+历史类合计606754微增约0.5%，物理类考生数估算约364660人，竞争基数基本稳定；大连理工大学位于辽宁省 （非本省），在河北省无显著地域偏好优势；该校2025年全国总招生计划中河北省占比约3.01%（18人/598人），占比不高；2026年物理类计划101人，较2025年159人大幅缩减， 但绝对人数仍属该校在冀主要生源省份之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次持续前移趋势、2026年计划大幅缩招（-36.5%）导致的竞争加剧、学校声誉偏负面对报考热 度的压制、以及本省考生总数基本稳定等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约3351名，区间2851–3851名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 大连理工大学2026年物理类在河北省大幅缩招至101人，且仅保留6个创新班/拔尖班专业，整体录取门槛将显著提高。位次在预测区间2851–3851名内建议以二档专业为主、一档 冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（<2851名）可重点冲击人工智能新工科大师班等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7376 → 8390 → 14383 → 4451 → 4252. In 2023, an abnormally high ranking (14383) occurred due to the splitting of major groups. In 2024, it rebounded significantly to 4451, and in 2025, it further advanced to 4252. The recent two years show a clear forward trend, with a baseline of about 4252 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province was 301 in 2021 → 245 in 2022 → 237 in 2023 → 175 in 2024 → 159 in 2025, with continuous contraction. The 2026 plan is 101, a reduction of about 36.5% compared to 2025, a significant contraction, leading to intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 28th (Top 30), with stable rankings in the 28–32 range in recent years, making it one of the top engineering powerhouses in China. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to admission cutoff signals (the 2023 Electronic Information and Electrical Engineering department cutoff dropped to 60000, and the 2024 admission line showed abnormal signals). On Douyin, it ranks 55th/106 in popularity, rated as relatively hot, with medium to high short video exposure. Historical admission anomaly signals are low concern, and overall reputation has a certain suppression on application psychology. Chemical Engineering and Technology is A+ (top in the country), Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Civil Engineering A, Business Administration A, Management Science and Engineering A, Software Engineering A, Control Science and Engineering A-, Environmental Science and Engineering A-. It has a total of 10 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous related majors of Dalian University of Technology continue to be highly recommended in 2026. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the ordinary college entrance examination in this province is 609800, a slight increase of about 0.5% compared to the total of 606754 for Physics and History categories in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 364660, with a basically stable competition base. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province (not this province), with no significant regional preference advantage in Hebei Province. In 2025, the university's national total enrollment plan had Hebei Province accounting for about 3.01% (18 people/598 people), a low proportion. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 101, a significant reduction from 159 in 2025, but the absolute number still makes it one of the main source provinces for the university in Hebei.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the intensified competition due to the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-36.5%), the suppression of application enthusiasm by the slightly negative university reputation, and the basically stable total number of candidates in this province, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 3351, with a range of 2851–3851.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Artificial Intelligence (New Engineering Master Class)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Class)
- Artificial Intelligence (Future Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (Innovation Class)
- Engineering Mechanics (Mechanics Engineering Basic Top Talent Plan Class)
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering (New Engineering Top Talent Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently (In 2026, Physics Category has only 6 enrollment majors, all of which are Innovation Class/Top Talent Class with high thresholds, overall ranking requirements are high).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology's Physics Category in Hebei Province has significantly reduced enrollment to 101 people, and only retains 6 Innovation Class/Top Talent Class majors, so the overall admission threshold will significantly increase. For rankings within the predicted range of 2851–3851, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors with Tier 1 as a reach; for rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2851), one can focus on hitting top majors like the Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Master Class.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次约1731→1755→3681→2531→2906，2023年因日语专业位次大幅后移（3681）拉低整体，2024年回升至2531，2025年小幅后移至2906，近 三年波动较大，2025年基准约2906名；该校在河北省历史类招生计划2021年27人→2022年18人→2023年26人→2024年46人→2025年46人，2024年起大幅扩招后保持稳 定；2026年计划43人，较2025年缩招3人（-6.5%），缩招幅度较小，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第28 名，为国内顶尖理工类高校，但历史类招生专业较少（仅5个），文科实力相对有限；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及录取断档信号；抖音热度排名第55/106 ，评价为较热；作为理工院校，声誉波动对历史类考生影响相对较小；工商管理A、管理科学与工程A等与历史类招生专业（公共事业管理、新闻传播学类）有一 定关联；但历史类主要专业（英语、日语、哲学类、建筑类）与该校核心工科优势学科匹配度不高。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 外语类专业社会热度一般观望，新闻传播类明显劝退 ，建筑类分化观望；本省2026年历史类考生数估算约245140人，较2025年243714人微增约0.59%，竞争基数基本稳定；大连理工 大学位于辽宁省，历史类在冀招生人数较少（43人），且专业以语言类、新闻传播类、哲学类为主，对河北历史类考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次波动 （2531→2906后移约375名）、2026年计划小幅缩招（-6.5%）、历史类招生专业与学校工科优势匹配度不高、本省考生总数基本稳定等因素，预测2026年历史类最低位次约2807名 ，区间2386–3228名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1731 → 1755 → 3681 → 2531 → 2906. In 2023, the ranking dropped significantly to 3681 due to the Japanese major, lowering the overall average. It rebounded to 2531 in 2024 and slightly dropped to 2906 in 2025, showing considerable fluctuation in the past three years. The baseline for 2025 is about 2906. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province was 27 in 2021 → 18 in 2022 → 26 in 2023 → 46 in 2024 → 46 in 2025. Since 2024, there has been a significant expansion, which has remained stable. The 2026 plan is 43, a reduction of 3 (-6.5%) compared to 2025, a relatively small decrease, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 28th, making it a top domestic science and engineering university. However, it offers few majors in History Category (only 5), and its liberal arts strength is relatively limited. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving signals of admission gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 55th out of 106, rated as relatively popular. As a science and engineering institution, reputation fluctuations have a relatively small impact on History Category candidates. Business Administration (A) and Management Science and Engineering (A) are somewhat related to History Category majors (Public Administration, Journalism and Communication). However, the main History Category majors (English, Japanese, Philosophy, Architecture) do not align well with the university's core engineering strengths.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Foreign language majors have generally lukewarm social popularity, Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged, and Architecture is divided. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in the province is about 245,140, a slight increase of about 0.59% from 243,714 in 2025, so the competition base is basically stable. Dalian University of Technology is located in Liaoning Province, with a small enrollment of 43 in History Category in Hebei, and the majors are mainly language, Journalism and Communication, and Philosophy, which have limited appeal to History Category candidates in Hebei.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the ranking fluctuations from 2024 to 2025 (2531 → 2906, a drop of about 375), the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-6.5%), the low alignment of History Category majors with the university's engineering strengths, and the basically stable number of candidates in the province, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 2807, with a range of 2386–3228.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Public Administration (including Public Administration + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree Program, Intellectual Property)
- Journalism and Communication Class.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Philosophy Class (including Philosophy + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree Program, Marxist Theory + Artificial Intelligence Dual Degree Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Dalian University of Technology enrolls 43 students in History Category in Hebei Province, with majors mainly in language, Journalism and Communication, and Philosophy, which have low alignment with the university's engineering strengths. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 2386–3228 are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors and aim for Tier 1 as a stretch. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2386) can consider Public Administration (Dual Degree Program) as a priority.
